items.name_en: The Celine Triomphe collection is a must-have this year, it's so beautiful! It's a global hit with many bloggers and influencers posting about it. Every Triomphe piece has its own unique charm. This tofu bag is truly lovely, casual and retro, yet very stylish. It has three compartments, which is plenty of space for a girl to put in her phone and cosmetics. The shoulder strap is adjustable! It looks cooler when worn, and can be sweet or edgy. Dimensions: Large 22 16 Small 18.5 14. Item No.: Large 191242 Small 188882

items.name_en: The new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning; I was instantly captivated by this crescent bag, and the premium feel is maxed out. It looks super good ✨ and elevates the look instantly. The best part is the bag shape!
items.name_cn:
The new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning; I was instantly captivated by this crescent bag, and the premium feel is maxed out. It looks super good ✨ and elevates the look instantly. The best part is the bag shape!
It's versatile: salty, sweet, for commuting, dates, crossbody, or shoulder, all look great. The capacity is perfect for daily use, and it pairs well with hoodies for a casual vibe. It's truly a versatile bag!
This bag also brings an effortless relaxed feel.
Specs: 21x24x5cm, moderate size.
Model: 120723

specs.rawTitle:
The new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning; I was instantly captivated by this crescent bag, and the premium feel is maxed out. It looks super good ✨ and elevates the look instantly. The best part is the bag shape!
